title: Common Pagination
description: Common v1 pagination placeholder for list contracts.
$comment: TODO: Phase 1 source documents do not define a concrete pagination model. Keep all fields optional until an API source document defines cursor/page rules.

page.description: Optional page number if a future API contract uses page-based pagination.

pageSize.description: Optional page size if a future API contract uses page-based pagination.

totalItems.description: Optional total item count when the provider exposes it.

nextCursor.description: Optional cursor for the next page when cursor pagination is used.

previousCursor.description: Optional cursor for the previous page when cursor pagination is used.
